data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the sending of email confirmations to customers after booking appointments. The prior steps do not include any mention of email confirmations being sent, indicating a gap in the implementation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that email confirmations are sent to customers after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
